log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Round 1: Too far for melee. Spiritual Weapon + ranged.
MOVEMENT: Moves toward Shifter — Unarmored Caster.
ACTION: Cast Spiritual Weapon (Level 2 slot). melee_spell attack vs Shifter — Unarmored Caster.
→ melee_spell attack: [d20:3+3=6 vs AC 15] MISS.
ACTION: Cast Sacred Flame (Level 0). DC 11 DEX save on Shifter — Unarmored Caster.
→ Shifter — Unarmored Caster: DEX save [d20:10+6=16 vs DC 11] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Round 1: Too far for melee. Spiritual Weapon + ranged.
MOVEMENT: Moves toward Shifter — Unarmored Caster.
ACTION: Cast Spiritual Weapon (Level 2 slot). melee_spell attack vs Shifter — Unarmored Caster.
→ melee_spell attack: [d20:8+3=11 vs AC 15] MISS.
ACTION: Cast Sacred Flame (Level 0). DC 11 DEX save on Shifter — Unarmored Caster.
→ Shifter — Unarmored Caster: DEX save [d20:18+6=24 vs DC 11] SUCCESS. No effect.
REASONING: Fireball on 1 targets!
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 14 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Shifter — Unarmored Caster: SUCCESS. 15 damage (half).
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Shifter — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 52/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: ROUND 1: 5 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):11+1=12 vs DC 16] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):5+1=6 vs DC 16] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):15+1=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):19+1=20 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Mage: WIS save [d20:1+4=5 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 3/5 targets affected.
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
